strengths: The opening begins with body symptoms, blood seepage, rear leak smell, and filter pressure, so the chapter stays scene-first.
The chapter turns a moral panic into an operational rule: keep, discard, observe, isolate, and define when the observation window ends.
Lu Chenzhou's agency is clear because he demands executable categories and converts medical uncertainty into vehicle procedure.
Lin Zhixia gets a strong functional payoff by defining a provisional triage system while continuing hands-on treatment.
The ending pull is concrete and commercially useful: the outer warehouse has needed supplies, but access is chained and controlled by someone else.

issues.evidence: The three-tier contamination triage is necessary, but it is delivered in a compact explanatory block.
issues.suggested_fix: Revision can sharpen the block by tying each category to one visible action or symptom, without removing the rule clarity.

issues.evidence: Most of the chapter happens inside the RV after the action-heavy fog-dog chase.
issues.suggested_fix: This is acceptable as a pressure-conversion chapter. If revising, add only a small external road or outer-warehouse pressure beat, not a full fight.

issues.evidence: Old Zheng and warehouse access arrive late through Zhou Xiaohe's line.
issues.suggested_fix: In revision, preserve the late arrival but keep the warehouse sign and chain vivid so the hook feels earned by visible evidence.

revision_priorities: Keep the opening body-pressure hook and no-recap structure.
Keep Lin Zhixia's triage rule provisional and action-triggered.
Preserve Lu Chenzhou's executable rule language: observation zone, living space, boarding qualification, and consequences.
Do not expand Qinghe interior politics or medical station layout.
If revising, tighten the triage explanation slightly and strengthen one exterior detail at the chained warehouse entrance.
human_approval_needed: Whether the provisional three-tier contamination triage should be locked as the early onboard rule.
Whether Old Zheng and the chained rear warehouse are the right chapter 7 entry hook.
